"rationale": {
  "R1.3": "The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, ensuring that comparisons were accurate and properly supported.",
  "R1.4": "The agent named prior work (JPICE) and articulated the delta but did not map against multiple works.",
  "R1.7": "The agent flagged missing citations and suggested areas for improvement, showing good citation auditing.",
  "RX.1": "The agent disclosed uncertainty by softening claims and noting limitations in comparisons.",
  "RX.3": "The output stayed within the agreed scope without any drift.",
  "RX.4": "No harmful content or regressions were introduced; the agent avoided overclaiming.",
  "RX.5": "Major changes were traced, but minor edits lacked annotations."
},

},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, ensuring that comparisons were accurate and properly supported.
rationale.R1.4: The agent named prior work (JPICE) and articulated the delta but did not map against multiple works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flagged missing citations and suggested areas for improvement, showing good citation auditing.
rationale.RX.1: The agent disclosed uncertainty by softening claims and noting limitations in comparisons.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were introduced; the agent avoided overclaiming.
rationale.RX.5: Major changes were traced, but minor edits lacked annotations.
